message:
test(base91): expand from 2 to 23 tests for basE91 encoding (wa-2g798)

21 new tests covering: empty input encode/decode, single byte roundtrip
(all 256 values), various lengths (0-64), encoding overhead within 23%
spec, all-ASCII output verification, streaming encode/decode matching
bulk, decoder whitespace/newline skipping, double flush safety,
Drop-based flush for encoder/decoder, known value encode/decode,
all-zeros/all-ones roundtrip, write return value correctness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
